description: Secure a multi-tier application by implementing network isolation using Docker. Create two custom bridge networks named 'frontend' and 'backend'. Deploy the following containers with their respective network and port configurations: 'web-proxy' (image: nginx:alpine) connected only to 'frontend' with host port 8081 mapped to container port 80; 'app-server' (image: httpd:alpine) connected to both 'frontend' and 'backend'; and 'data-store' (image: redis:alpine) connected only to 'backend' with host port 6380 mapped to container port 6379. The architecture must ensure 'web-proxy' cannot directly communicate with 'data-store' while 'app-server' maintains access to both.
